text_block_list.name: Teacher A
text_block_list.text:
All right, time for some stretches! Pair<n>off,
everyone!
Hey, be my partner! Come on!

text_block_list.name: Colega de Classe A
text_block_list.text:
Um... Hey, Taishin! Have you found a<n>partner yet?
If not, how about we<n>stretch together?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Ugh... Great. I hate it when we have to<n>do things in
pairs.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
There's no way I can fake being all<n>friendly. I bet
she feels like she got<n>the short end of the stick.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Narita Taishin barely tries during<n>training that day.
